THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSES, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET #510, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-29-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EXEC OF WRIT STAYED UNTIL 5PM ON 4/29/97. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE, PLTF ENTITLED TO AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR $355 BACK RENT, DMGS OF $8.17/DAY FROM 3/15/97 THRU 4/29/97 PLUS $83 COSTS. ANY SEC. DEPOSIT FORF TO PLTF. SEE JUDGMNT FOR ADDITIONAL CONDITIONS.
